DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT GEMENTERA, SHAWN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHEUENSTUHL, MAUREEN AS TRUSTEE OF ELLEN BROSNAN-CARROLL TRUST LIVING TRUST UNDER DECLARATION OF TRUST DATED SEPTEMBER 17, 2002 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOMIN, DANIELLE BENEDETTI, BROOK (SUED AS BROOK MARIE BENEDETTI) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 743 - 29TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $4,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,500.00, UPON CONDITION THAT DEFENDANTS PAY TO PLAINTIFF THE SUM OF $3,000.00 ON OR BEFORE 9/1/06, RESTITUTION OF POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES SHALL BE STAYED THROUGH 10/31/06 AND COLLECTION ON THE REMAINING MONEY JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,500.00 SHALL BE STAYED THROUGH 2/1/07. IF DEFENDANTS DO NOT MAKE $3,000.00 PAYMENT BEFORE 9/1/06, PLAINTIFF WILL BE ENTITLED TO IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES. A WRIT OF EXECUTION MAY ISSUE AND BE POSTED ON THE PREMISES IMMEDIATELY NOTING THE STAYS GRANTED ABOVE IF THEN APPLICABLE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
